objective.zh: 本项目旨在降低居家健身的使用门槛，提升用户的运动体验与训练效果，通过更好的功能设计帮助用户自律坚持、安全健康地锻炼身体。通过引入基于AI的动作识别与评估技术，利用手机前置摄像头对用户运动过程进行实时建模，并与标准教练动作进行对比分析，系统能够即时反馈动作准确度与规范性。项目希望在无需高昂私教成本的前提下，为用户提供专业、直观且低压力的健身指导，从而帮助其科学训练、减少运动损伤风险，并持续提升居家健身的参与感与成效。
objective.en: This project aims to lower the threshold for home fitness, enhance users' exercise experience and training effectiveness, and help users exercise self-discipline, safety and health through better functional design. By introducing AI-based motion recognition and assessment technology, the system can use the front camera of the mobile phone to model the user's exercise process in real time and compare it with the standard coach's movements for analysis. The system can immediately provide feedback on the accuracy and standardization of the movements. The project hopes to provide users with professional, intuitive and low-pressure fitness guidance without the need for high-cost personal trainers, thereby helping them train scientifically, reduce the risk of sports injuries, and continuously improve the sense of participation and effectiveness of home fitness.

challenge.zh:
项目的挑战有以下几点：

1. 用户手机摄像头往往是2D摄像头，而想实现精准的动作姿态评估需要3D数据。因此我们通过Openpose的2D-3D预测模型实现了骨架的空间深度估计。

2. 常规的坐标相似度计算方式（余弦相似度等）会出现万向节死锁等问题，导致骨架相似度计算失准。我们引入了机器人领域常见的四元数相似度算法，实现更精准更高效地表达建模用户骨架。
challenge.en:
The challenges of the project are as follows:
1. The user's mobile phone camera is usually a 2D camera, while achieving precise motion posture assessment requires 3D data. Therefore, we implemented the spatial depth estimation of the skeleton through the 2D-3D prediction model of Openpose.
2. The conventional coordinate similarity calculation methods (such as cosine similarity) may encounter problems like joint deadlock, resulting in inaccurate calculation of skeleton similarity. We introduced the quaternion similarity algorithm commonly used in the field of robotics to achieve more accurate and efficient representation of the user's skeleton model.

content.zh: 作为一个2021年立项的创新创业项目，本人负责了整个产品的构建、技术选型、前后端开发，攻克了AI识别的难点，实现了极早的AI+传统软件布局。也因此项目，受到腾讯、华为等公司内部成员关注，希望能将此产品思路带入各公司后期的项目中。在腾讯开始做相关业务后，我也因此加入实习，专注打磨ieg部门的图像算法和相关产品
content.en: As a project initiated in 2021, I was responsible for the entire product's construction, technical selection, front-end and back-end development, and overcame the difficulties in AI recognition, achieving an early integration of AI and traditional software. As a result, this project attracted the attention of internal members of companies such as Tencent and Huawei, who hoped to incorporate this product concept into their subsequent projects. After Tencent began to engage in related business, I also joined as an intern, focusing on polishing the image algorithms and related products of the ieg department.

content.zh:
本项目灵感来源于疫情期间带火的居家健身浪潮。在实际体验了健身软件keep、网络直播跟练、线上健身私教课等模式后，我意识到，居家健身对于普通人仍有较高的上手门槛。

问题包括：用户线上跟练无法获得动作指导和及时反馈，无法确认自身的跟练效果，从而可能对健身成效产生焦虑情绪，甚至可能因动作不规范受伤。而一对一的私教课收费高昂，上课时心理压力较大，不满足许多人居家时想随时轻松运动的需求。因此，我们基于AI技术，实现了用手机前置摄像头对用户动作的精准建模，并与教练的动作做相似度评估，将动作准确度实时反馈给用户。
content.en:
The inspiration for this project comes from the home fitness trend that gained popularity during the pandemic. After experiencing various home fitness models such as the fitness app Keep, online live-streaming workouts, and online private fitness classes, I realized that there are still high entry barriers for ordinary people to engage in home fitness.

The problems include: users cannot receive movement guidance and timely feedback when following online classes, and they cannot confirm their exercise effect, which may cause anxiety about the fitness results and even lead to injuries due to incorrect movements. Moreover, one-on-one private classes are expensive and cause psychological pressure during the class, which does not meet the needs of many people who want to exercise casually at home. Therefore, based on AI technology, we have achieved precise modeling of users' movements using the front camera of their mobile phones and evaluated the similarity with the coach's movements, displaying the accuracy of the movements in real time on the screen.

caption.zh: 针对现有软件存在的诸多不足，我们利用全新的AI技术，给用户实时反馈，保障用户的运动安全并提升运动积极性
caption.en: In response to the numerous shortcomings of existing software, we have utilized cutting-edge AI technology to provide real-time feedback to users, ensuring their exercise safety and enhancing their enthusiasm for physical activity.

title.en: Analysis of Pain Points of Benchmark Products

description.zh: 针对现有软件存在的诸多不足，我们利用全新的AI技术，给用户实时反馈，保障用户的运动安全并提升运动积极性
description.en: In response to the numerous shortcomings of existing software, we have utilized cutting-edge AI technology to provide real-time feedback to users, ensuring their exercise safety and enhancing their enthusiasm for physical activity.

description.zh: 在首页，我们展示了健身日历的卡片栏，今日课程和推荐课程，方便用户快速进入课堂和训练状态
description.en: On the homepage, we have presented the card section of the fitness calendar, the current day's classes and recommended classes, making it convenient for users to quickly access the classes and training mode.

description.zh: 在首页中预约课程后，可在日历中看到课程安排。同时也可以添加自己的健身计划，记录每日运动情况
description.en: After making a course reservation on the homepage, you can view the course schedule in the calendar. At the same time, you can also add your own fitness plan and record your daily exercise situation.

description.zh: 为保证动作识别准确，给出正确评价和引导，我们进行在ROS2上进行了仿真测试，优化了模型准确度
description.en: To ensure the accuracy of action recognition and provide correct evaluation and guidance, we conducted simulation tests on ROS2 and optimized the model's accuracy.

title.zh: 商业计划PPT首页宣传形象
title.en: The promotional image on the first page of the business plan PPT

description.zh: 图中背景为软件各层级页面截图
description.en: The background of the picture shows screenshots of the various levels of pages of the software.

description.zh: 我们为软件设计了成熟的logo和宣传形象
description.en: We have designed a mature logo and promotional image for the software.

description.zh: 课程播放界面的初期demo示例，功能正常但界面待调整
description.en: The initial demo example of the course playback interface, the functions are normal but the interface needs to be adjusted.

objective.zh: 本项目希望通过融合AI技术、电商社区，打造一款基于电子衣橱功能的购物软件，支持试穿、AI一键扫描导入并分类、支持从商城购买直接导入。既提升了用户体验又实现了较好的商业化，实现了“购物-衣橱整理-穿搭推荐”的链路闭环。
objective.en: This project aims to integrate AI technology and e-commerce communities to create a shopping software with the function of an electronic wardrobe. It supports try-on, one-click AI scanning for import and classification, and enables direct import from the mall. This not only enhances the user experience but also achieves good commercialization, realizing a closed-loop of the chain of shopping - wardrobe organization - outfit recommendation.

content.zh: 本项目想法始于2023年初，从实际痛点与商业化前景出发，我设计了这款软件。软件自带的扫描工具可以自动扫描出衣物轮廓并通过AI平整化，**自动分类衣物类型、颜色、适合的季节和场合等**。首页会根据用户喜好、当日天气推送穿搭，并**附身到身材与用户相仿的AI模特身上供参考**，用户也可以选择**今日出行场合来调整推荐**。商业化方面，我设计了服装商城与穿搭广场两个功能。
content.en: The idea for this project originated in early 2023. Based on practical problems and commercial prospects, I designed this software. The software comes with a scanning tool that can automatically scan the contours of clothes and smooth them through AI technology. It can also **automatically classify the types, colors, suitable seasons and occasions of the clothes**. The homepage will **recommend outfits based on the user's preferences and the current weather, and will be "attached" to an AI model with a similar body shape for reference**. Users can also choose **"the current travel occasion"** to adjust the recommendations. In terms of commercialization, I have designed two functions: a clothing mall and a dressing square.

content.zh:
设计这两个商业化功能的时候，我面临团队成员提出的两个问题：
**1. 凭什么认为用户有动力扫描衣柜里的所有衣物？**
**2. 用户凭什么使用这样一个新软件购买衣服？**
content.en:
When designing these two commercial functions, I encountered two questions raised by my team members:
**1. Why do you think users will be motivated to scan all the clothes in their wardrobes? **
**2. How can users use this new software to purchase clothes? **

content.zh:
这两个问题指向本产品的重要特性：**高用户粘性，但也高上手门槛。**因此我需要一个用户愿意上手的理由，并尽可能降低使用门槛。
面对此优化目标，我的设计是：

1. 进入产品时仅需填写一次身形信息，在本平台购物会**提供身材相仿的AI模特试衣并自动推荐尺码。**
2. 根据退货反馈不断**迭代优化推荐算法**，保证算法精准
3. 在本平台购入的衣服不需要到手后再扫描，而是**从商品图中直接提取，自动归档到衣柜并颁发购买认证的精美数字卡片**

这样一来，产品就从单纯的电子衣橱产品变成了一款“足够好用”的衣橱购物软件，只是我们依旧把衣橱和AI穿搭推荐放在首页，依旧保证软件的功能性实用性优先。
content.en:
These two issues point to the key features of this product: **high user stickiness, but also high learning barriers.** Therefore, I need a reason for users to be willing to get started, and I need to minimize the usage barriers as much as possible.
Facing this optimization goal, my design is:

**1. When entering the product, only the body information needs to be filled in once. When shopping on this platform, AI models with similar body shapes will be provided for try-on and size recommendations will be automatically offered.**
**2. Continuously iterate and optimize the recommendation algorithm based on return feedback to ensure its accuracy.**
**3. Clothes purchased on this platform do not need to be scanned after delivery; instead, they can be directly extracted from the product images, automatically archived to the wardrobe, and awarded a beautiful digital card for purchase certification.**

In this way, the product has transformed from a simple electronic wardrobe product into a "sufficiently functional" wardrobe shopping software. However, we still place the wardrobe and AI outfit recommendations on the homepage, and still prioritize the functionality and practicality of the software.

description.zh: 产品图中突出AI衣橱功能，核心面向女性用户
description.en: The product illustration highlights the AI wardrobe function, with the core focus on female users.

description.zh: 在首页中，我们展示每日推荐衣橱 (ai上身效果图)、天气等信息
description.en: On the homepage, we display daily recommended wardrobes (virtual appearance effects), weather information, etc.

description.zh: 我们通过AI视觉算法，自动将服饰分类并扁平化，归类成电子衣橱展示
description.en: We use AI visual algorithms to automatically categorize and flatten the clothing, and then classify them into an electronic wardrobe for display.

title.zh: 现有产品的痛点与不足
title.en: Current product pain points and shortcomings

description.zh: 当前产品主要聚焦在购物和社媒，没有关注个人衣橱、AI试衣、每日穿搭推荐等工具属性功能，并不“智能”、“好用”。
description.en: The current product mainly focuses on shopping and social media, without paying attention to functions such as personal wardrobe management, AI fitting, and daily outfit recommendations.

objective.zh: 本项目是字节跳动主办的比赛“抖音AI创变者大赛”的参赛作品，目标是设计一款抖音AI小程序，让AI生成视频像抖音剪辑模板一样流程化、结果可控，轻松翻拍出大片效果。可自制AI创作工作流模板上传分享，可与明星idol生成互动视频、虚拟IP联动，一键发布至抖音
objective.en: This project is an entry for the "ByteDance AI Innovator Challenge" hosted by ByteDance. The goal is to design a Douyin AI mini-program that enables AI-generated videos to be as process-oriented and result-controllable as Douyin's editing templates, allowing users to easily create high-quality videos. Users can create and upload their own AI creation workflow templates for sharing, interact with videos featuring their favorite stars or virtual IPs, and publish the results directly to Douyin with just one click.

challenge.zh:
**难点⼀：模型⽣成效果的优化与控制**
模型⽣成内容的质量和可控性是整个项⽬的基⽯。单纯依赖基础模型的输出难以满⾜可被广泛传播的视频质量，我们通过精细化的Prompt优化和智能化的路由设置对其优化。
• 优化Prompt⼯程： 为了提升⽣成内容的准确性和艺术性，我们摒弃了简单通⽤的提⽰词。我们⾸先调⽤⼤语⾔模型对Whisper⽣成的初步字幕稿进⾏修正，随后，在分镜编排阶段，我们根据⾳乐⻛格动态选择不同的Prompt模板，引导⼤语⾔模型⽣成结构化、富有创意的分镜脚本，确保⽣成内容既贴合⾳乐主题，⼜充满想象⼒。
• 智能路由设置：不同的⾳乐⻛格（如摇滚、流⾏、古典）需要截然不同的视觉语⾔。为实现这⼀点，我们设计了⾳乐⻛格路由机制。在管线（Pipeline）的早期阶段，我们利⽤ qwen-omniturbo 模型对输⼊⾳频进⾏分析，精准地输出⻛格分类标签。后续的“⼤模型分镜编排”环节将依据此标签，调⽤针对性的、预设的Prompt策略库，从⽽为不同⻛格的⾳乐匹配最合适的视觉叙事逻辑和画⾯元素，实现了⽣成效果的⾃动化与定制化。

**难点⼆：主体⻛格化⼀致性**
在MV中，核⼼⼈物或主体的形象必须在不同场景和镜头中保持⻛格上的⾼度统⼀，这是视觉叙事的基础。为解决这⼀难题，我们优化了算法链路，设计了⼀套“两步⾛”的⽣成策略。
1. 锚定核⼼⻛格： ⾸先，在“⻛格化⼈物绘制”步骤中，我们集中资源，优先⽣成⼀张⾼质量、⻛格明确的核⼼⼈物参考图，这张图⽚将作为整个MV的视觉基⽯。
2. 引导后续⽣成： 在随后的“分镜场景图⽚⽣成”和“分镜场景视频⽣成”阶段，我们将这张⼈物⻛格化图⽚作为视觉参考（Image Prompt/Reference），与⽂本Prompt⼀同输⼊给即梦API和Seedance模型。这种⽅式强制后续所有的场景图⽚和视频⽚段在⼈物形象、画⻛、⾊调等⽅⾯严格对⻬初始设定，有效保证了整个MV在视觉⻛格上的⼀致性和连贯性。

**难点三：MV画⾯与⾳乐歌词的精准匹配**
• 时⻓对⻬与倍速处理： 在“视频对⻬与合成”阶段，我们利⽤FFmpeg⼯具进⾏⾃动化处理。系统会遍历每⼀个分镜脚本，将Seedance⽣成的视频⽚段时⻓与对应分镜的字幕显⽰时⻓进⾏精确对⻬。如果视频⽚段过⻓或过短，我们会通过倍速处理（加速或降速）来强制其时⻓与字幕时⻓完全匹配。
• 最终合成： 所有经过时⻓对⻬的视频⽚段将按顺序拼接，并将经过⼤模型修正后的SRT字幕⽂件映射到视频画⾯上，最后与原始MP3⾳频合并，⽣成最终的MV。这⼀系列操作确保了每⼀帧画⾯都严格对应其应有的歌词和⾳乐节点，实现了视听的⾼度同步。
• 以字幕时间戳为基准： 管线的前期步骤通过 whisper 模型处理原始⾳频，提取歌词内容并获得每个词或每句歌词毫秒级的时间戳，并⽣成SRT（字幕）⽂件。
challenge.en:
**Challenge 1: Optimization and Control of Model Generation Results** 
The quality and controllability of the generated content by the model are the cornerstone of the entire project. Relying solely on the output of the basic model is insufficient to meet the quality requirements of commercial MVs. We mainly solve this problem through refined Prompt optimization and intelligent routing settings.
• Optimization of Prompt Engineering: To enhance the accuracy and artistry of the generated content, we abandoned simple and general prompt words. First, we called the large language model to correct the initial script drafted by Whisper. Then, during the storyboard arrangement stage, we dynamically selected different Prompt templates based on the music style to guide the large language model to generate structured and creative storyboard scripts, ensuring that the generated content is both in line with the music theme and full of imagination.
• Intelligent Routing Settings: Different music styles (such as rock, pop, classical) require completely different visual languages. To achieve this, we designed a music style routing mechanism. In the early stage of the pipeline, we used the qwen-omni-turbo model to analyze the input audio and precisely output style classification labels. The subsequent "large model storyboard arrangement" stage will use this label to call the targeted and preset Prompt strategy library, thereby matching the most suitable visual narrative logic and picture elements for different styles of music, achieving the automation and customization of the generation effect. 

**Challenge 2: Consistency in Mainstream Style** 
In the MV, the image of the main character or the central figure must maintain a high degree of consistency in style across different scenes and shots, which is the foundation of visual storytelling. To solve this problem, we optimized the algorithm chain and designed a "two-step" generation strategy.
1. Anchor the core style: Firstly, in the "stylized character drawing" step, we concentrate our resources and prioritize the generation of a high-quality, clearly styled reference image of the main character. This image will serve as the visual cornerstone for the entire MV.
2. Guide subsequent generation: In the subsequent "scene image generation" and "scene video generation" stages, we use this stylized character image as a powerful visual reference (Image Prompt/Reference), along with the text Prompt, to input into the Yimeng API and Seedance model. This approach forces all subsequent scene images and video segments to strictly align with the initial setting in terms of character image, style, and color tone, thereby effectively ensuring the high consistency and coherence of the visual style throughout the entire MV. 

**Challenge 3: Precise Matching of MV Scenes with Music Lyrics** 
• Duration alignment and speed-up processing: During the "video alignment and synthesis" stage, we use the FFmpeg tool for automated processing. The system will traverse each storyboard script, precisely aligning the duration of the video clips generated by Seedance with the display duration of the corresponding storyboard captions. If the video clips are too long or too short, we will use speed-up processing (acceleration or deceleration) to force their duration to match exactly with the caption duration.
• Final synthesis: All the video clips that have been aligned in duration will be spliced in sequence, and the SRT subtitle file corrected by the large model will be  map onto the video frame. Finally， it will be merged with the original MP3 audio to generate the final MV. This series of operations ensures that each frame of the picture strictly corresponds to its corresponding lyrics and music nodes， achieving a high degree of synchronization between audio and video. The essence of MV is the art of combining audio and video， and the picture must be precisely synchronized with the lyrics content， music rhythm and mood. We achieved the precise alignment and synthesis of video content by using the subtitle timing sequence as the core benchmark.
• Based on subtitle timestamps： The early steps of the pipeline process the original audio using the whisper model. It not only extracts the lyrics content， but more importantly， obtains the precise millisecond timestamps for each word or each line of lyrics and generates an SRT (subtitle) file.

content.zh: **抖音“AI创变者大赛”决赛项目（全国前20）**，团队成员来自北大、清华、同济共4人。本人作为软件开发、产品、设计深度参与，共计耗时一个月完成。并在决赛现场48小时黑客松迭代产品，制作出产品宣传片、产品宣传海报、商业计划书、商业计划PPT等内容。
content.en: The final project of the "AI Innovators Competition" on Douyin (among the top 20 nationwide), with a team of 4 members from Peking University, Tsinghua University, and Tongji University. I was deeply involved in software development, product design, and overall project management, and completed the project within a total of one month. During the final competition, we conducted a 48-hour hackathon to iterate the product, creating product promotional videos, product promotional posters, business plans, and business plan PPTs, among other things.

content.zh: 我们的产品深度与抖音生态接轨，当用户刷到他人上传的AI视频时，可以一键翻拍、生成自己的同款视频。可以拍摄与明星idol、潮流ip的互动视频，可以制作生成自己的视频模板上传分享，赚取收益。遇到最新爆火的bgm模板，也可以一键导入翻拍成自己想要的音乐MV
content.en: Our product is deeply integrated with the Douyin ecosystem. When users come across AI videos uploaded by others, they can simply click to remake and generate their own version of the video. They can shoot interactive videos with their favorite stars or trendy IPs, create and upload their own video templates to share and earn income. When they encounter the latest popular BGM templates, they can also import them with one click and remake them into the MV they want.

description.zh: 作为一款ai MV生成工具，logo将MV字母融入设计，颜色与波纹体现ai科技和音乐律动
description.en: As an AI-generated MV tool, the logo integrates the letters of the MV into the design, with the colors and waves reflecting the AI technology and the rhythm of music.

description.en: The underlying technical implementation architecture diagram of this product

objective.zh:
本项目旨在构建一个低成本、高效、可靠且实用的科研辅助系统。核心目标是解决当前学术研究中“文献过载”与“大语言模型幻觉”问题，最终实现了下列任务：

突破 Token 限制： 在免费或低成本API（通常限制 4096 Tokens）的约束下，实现对大量文献的深度分析。

消除幻觉风险： 通过工程化手段和多重校验算法，确保生成的综述基于真实存在的文献证据。

提升响应速度： 利用异步并发技术，将长流程的文献分析时间压缩至用户可接受的范围内（至少60秒以内）。

增强可视化体验： 将枯燥的文本转化为直观的知识图谱、词云和时间轴，提供导出PDF和Markdown文档，导出参考文献，辅助用户快速决策和调研。
objective.en:
This project aims to build a low-cost, efficient, reliable and practical research assistance system. The core objective is to address the current issues of "overload of literature" and "the illusion of large language models" in academic research, and ultimately achieves the following tasks: 

Overcoming Token Limitations: Achieve in-depth analysis of a large number of documents within the constraints of free or low-cost APIs (which usually limit to 4096 Tokens).

Eliminating the Risk of Illusions: Through engineering methods and multiple verification algorithms, ensure that the generated summaries are based on real existing literature evidence.

Improving Response Speed: Utilize asynchronous concurrent technology to compress the long process of document analysis into a time range that is acceptable to users (at least within 60 seconds).

Enhancing Visual Experience: Transform dry text into intuitive knowledge graphs, word clouds and timelines, and provide the option to export PDF and Markdown documents, as well as export references to assist users in making quick decisions and conducting research.

content.zh: 本项目获得北京大学课程设计一等奖，提出的创新方案已产生一篇待投Workshop论文。目前，本项目已在我校部分硕博研究生实验室开始推广使用，收到许多同学的好评和建议。
content.en: This project won the first prize in the course design competition of Peking University. The innovative solution proposed has resulted in a Workshop paper that is awaiting submission. At present, this project has been introduced and put into use in some graduate student laboratories of our university. It has received many positive comments and suggestions from the students.

content.zh: 随着人工智能技术的飞速发展，科研产出的速度要求越来越高。对于研究人员，尤其是刚刚步入特定领域的初学者而言，如何在海量文献中快速梳理出清晰的脉络、识别关键技术路线，成为了科研工作的一大难题。作为一名硕士研究生，在实验室与同门科研交流时，我意识到，这是一个普遍存在的痛点，大家急需一款能真正提高效率的科研辅助工具。
content.en: With the rapid development of artificial intelligence technology, the speed of scientific research output is becoming increasingly demanding. For researchers, especially beginners who are just entering a specific field, how to quickly sort out a clear framework and identify key technical routes from the vast amount of literature has become a major challenge in scientific research. As a master's student, when communicating with fellow researchers in the laboratory, I realized that this was a common pain point that everyone urgently needed a tool to truly improve efficiency.

content.zh:
现有的解决方案存在明显的两极分化：
    1. 传统检索工具（如 Google Scholar）：侧重于文献的罗列，缺乏对内容的深度语义理解和自动归纳，用户仍需耗费大量时间阅读摘要。
    2. 通用大语言模型（如 ChatGPT）：虽然具备强大的文本生成能力，但由于缺乏对实时学术数据库的访问权限以及其生成式机制的固有缺陷，极易产生“幻觉”（Hallucination）。例如，编造不存在的论文标题、错误的作者年份或虚构的实验数据。
content.en:
The existing solutions have obvious polarization:
    1. Traditional search tools (such as Google Scholar): focus on listing of literature, lacking in-depth semantic understanding and automatic summarization of content, and users still need to spend a lot of time reading abstracts.
    2. General large language models (such as ChatGPT): although they have strong text generation capabilities, due to the lack of access to real-time academic databases and the inherent defects of their generative mechanism, they are prone to "hallucinations" (false information). For example, fabricating non-existent paper titles, incorrect author years or fictional experimental data.

content.zh: 此外，市面上现有的 AI 科研辅助工具（如 Connected Papers 等）往往收费高昂，且在处理长文本时受到 Token 数量的限制，难以满足学生群体低成本、高效率的需求。
content.en: In addition, the existing AI research assistance tools on the market (such as Connected Papers, etc.) are often expensive and are limited by the number of tokens when processing long texts, making it difficult to meet the low-cost and high-efficiency needs of the student group.

content.zh: 从功能上来看，PaperPuppy 实现了对学术文献调研流程的全自动化重构。我将多个主流学术数据库（如 arXiv、Google Scholar、OpenAlex 等）进行统一整合，通过多源检索与质量过滤，快速构建高质量文献集合。在此基础上，系统能够自动提取论文中的关键信息（如研究问题、方法、实验设置等），并进一步完成主题聚类分析，最终生成结构清晰、逻辑严谨的综述文章。同时，我还设计了可视化模块，将研究趋势、关键词关系和时间演化过程以知识图谱、时间轴和词云等形式直观呈现，并支持 Markdown 与 PDF 等多格式导出以及中英文双语生成，显著提升了科研工作的效率与体验。
content.en: From a functional perspective, PaperPuppy has achieved a fully automated reconfiguration of the academic literature research process. I have unified and integrated multiple mainstream academic databases (such as arXiv, Google Scholar, OpenAlex, etc.) through multi-source search and quality filtering, quickly constructing a high-quality collection of literature. On this basis, the system can automatically extract key information from the papers (such as research questions, methods, experimental settings, etc.), and further complete topic clustering analysis, ultimately generating a clearly structured and logically rigorous review article. At the same time, I have designed a visualization module, presenting research trends, keyword relationships, and time evolution processes in the form of knowledge graphs, timelines, and word clouds, and supporting multiple formats of export (such as Markdown and PDF) as well as bilingual generation in Chinese and English, significantly enhancing the efficiency and experience of scientific research work.

content.zh: 在技术创新方面，我提出并实现了一个核心的**三级蒸馏机制（Three-stage Distillation）**。在第一阶段，我将原始论文压缩为结构化“知识卡片”，极大降低了 Token 消耗；在第二阶段，通过语义聚类提炼研究主题，形成综述骨架；在第三阶段，再基于骨架生成完整综述。这一分层处理方式有效突破了大模型上下文长度限制，使系统能够在低成本条件下处理大量文献。此外，我结合异步并发处理，将原本耗时较长的文献分析过程优化至约 20 秒内完成，实现了性能上的显著提升。
content.en: In terms of technological innovation, I proposed and implemented a core **three-stage distillation mechanism**. In the first stage, I compressed the original paper into structured "knowledge cards", significantly reducing token consumption; in the second stage, through semantic clustering, the research topic was refined to form a review framework; in the third stage, a complete review was generated based on the framework. This hierarchical processing method effectively broke through the context length limitation of large models, enabling the system to handle a large amount of literature at a low cost. Additionally, by combining asynchronous concurrent processing, the previously time-consuming literature analysis process was optimized to be completed within approximately 20 seconds, achieving a significant performance improvement.

content.zh: 针对大语言模型在科研场景中的“幻觉问题”，我构建了一套系统性的幻觉控制与可信度评估机制。具体而言，我通过多源一致性校验、基于引用频次的加权策略以及规则与模型结合的信息抽取方法，对生成内容进行约束与校验。同时，我设计了多维度置信度评分模型，从摘要信息量、论文新颖性、关键词多样性及相关性等多个角度量化评估结果可靠性，并为每一条结论提供可追溯的原始文献链接。这使得系统生成的综述不仅具备良好的可读性，也具备较高的事实准确性与学术可信度。
content.en: Regarding the "hallucination problem" of large language models in scientific research scenarios, I have developed a systematic mechanism for hallucination control and credibility assessment. Specifically, I impose constraints and verify the generated content through multi-source consistency checks, a weighted strategy based on citation frequency, and an information extraction method combining rules and the model. At the same time, I have designed a multi-dimensional confidence scoring model to quantitatively evaluate the reliability of the results from multiple perspectives such as the amount of summary information, the novelty of the paper, the diversity and relevance of keywords, etc., and provide a traceable original literature link for each conclusion. This enables the system-generated review to not only have good readability but also high factual accuracy and academic credibility.

description.zh: 通过Nano Banana设计了Paper Puppy卡通形象和文字样式
description.en: The Paper Puppy cartoon character and text style were designed through the Nano Banana approach.

description.zh: 每次打开本工具，会自动爬取OpenAlex一年内的高引用量文章，和arXiv一周内发表的新文章。同时满足新动态和大热点的追踪。
description.en: Each time this tool is opened, it will automatically retrieve the articles with high citation rates within one year from OpenAlex, as well as the newly published articles within one week from arXiv. At the same time, it also tracks the latest developments and major hotspots.

description.zh: 为了压缩token使用量并提高响应速度，我设计了这样的三层蒸馏架构，快速且并行地提取所有文章的关键信息
description.en: In order to reduce the token usage and enhance the response speed, I designed this three-layer distillation architecture to quickly and concurrently extract the key information of all articles.

description.zh: 在项目初期，我做了上述几种产品的分析调研，发现这类产品在科研领域仍存在诸多问题
description.en: At the beginning of the project, I conducted an analysis and research on these various products, and found that there were still many problems in this type of product in the field of scientific research.

description.zh: 根据竞品存在的不足，我给产品设计了上述几个特色定位，作为核心竞争力
description.en: Based on the shortcomings of the competing products, I have designed the above-mentioned several distinctive features for the product, which serve as its core competitiveness.

category.zh: AI 硬件, AI Agent, 微信小程序
category.en: AI Hardware, AI Agent, Wechat Miniprogram

objective.zh: 本产品目标是顺应AI Agent浪潮，切入细分市场售卖AI+硬件，小规模做一次创业尝试。
objective.en: The aim of this product is to ride the wave of AI Agents and enter the niche market to sell AI combined with hardware. It intends to make a small-scale entrepreneurial attempt.

content.zh: 这是本人的第二个创业项目，团队成员均来自清华和北大。初期通过小红书等社交媒体验证市场，同步研发软硬件。在积累了一定客户规模后，开始打板生产并请了专门的运营客服成员完善售后流程。本产品最终实现连续数**月营业额在10w+**。
content.en: This is my second entrepreneurial project. The team members are all from Tsinghua University and Peking University. Initially, we verified the market through social media platforms like Xiaohongshu and simultaneously developed both software and hardware. After accumulating a certain customer base, we started to produce in batches and hired dedicated operation and customer service staff to improve the after-sales process. Eventually, the product achieved a **monthly revenue of over 100,000 yuan for several consecutive months**.

description.zh: 双十一期间我们发布的促销活动海报
description.en: The promotional activity posters we released during the Double Eleven (11.11) period

description.zh: 作为一个全新的AI创业产品，我们取得了较好的销售额
description.en: As a new AI-based entrepreneurial product, we have achieved good sales results.

description.zh: 我们铺设矩阵账号，积累了第一批众筹+内测用户，构建私域生态，同时完成市场验证
description.en: We established matrix accounts, accumulated the first batch of crowdfunding and internal testing users, built a private ecosystem, and simultaneously completed market validation.

description.zh: 每个账号都获得了较好的浏览数据
description.en: Each account has achieved good browsing data.

description.zh: 可以在小程序端完成设备配对、选择人物形象、保存聊天记录和记忆等
description.en: You can complete device pairing, select character images, save chat records and memories, etc. on the mini-program side.

title.zh: Leo's - 零代码作品集搭建平台

objective.zh: 本工作的目标是构建一个人人都能快速上手的个人网站搭建框架，通过前后端分离结构实现安全、快速、高效、零基础搭建个人网站。
objective.en: The goal of this work is to build a framework for setting up personal websites that everyone can quickly get started with. By adopting a front-end and back-end separation structure, it aims to achieve the secure, fast, efficient, and zero-threshold setup of personal websites.

content.zh: 求职过程中，我发现项目经历通过简历很难充分展示，遂开始搭建个人网站。发现当前所有的个人网站模板都需要代码基础，需要直接在代码上进行项目修改上传，**开发门槛高、编辑效率低**。因此我决定推翻旧有个人网站模板的推广方式，通过可视化交互界面直接编辑网页内容，快速上手。
content.en: During the job hunting process, I realized that project experience could not be fully presented through a resume. So I started to build my own personal website. I found that all current personal website templates require a basic knowledge of coding and require direct modification and uploading of projects on the code. **The development threshold is high and the editing efficiency is low**. Therefore, I decided to abandon the traditional promotion method of the old personal website templates and directly edit the web content through a visual interactive interface, so as to quickly get started.

description.zh: Logo灵感来自制作本网站时的工作环境，通过Nano Banana调整并最终实现此效果，并支持深浅双色
description.en: The logo was inspired by the working environment during the creation of this website. It was adjusted and finalized using Nano Banana, and supports both light and dark colors.

title.zh: 管理员端 - 项目管理页面

description.zh: 本项目提供完整的自定义编辑界面，可通过拖动点击实现网页编辑
description.en: This project offers a complete customizable editing interface, allowing for web page editing through dragging and clicking.

description.zh: 实现简历上传、重命名、版本管理、根据求职需求选择展示的简历
description.en: Enable resume upload, renaming, version management, and selection of resume display based on job application requirements.
